channel.title: Projects on Sebian Van de Spiegle
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Sebian Van de Spiegle

item.title: AlphaTracer Mobile
item.author: sebian.vandespiegle@student.odisee.be (Sebian Van de Spiegle)
item.description:
AlphaTracer is a smart stock portfolio and price alerting application built natively for Android.

Skills Demonstrated: Android SDK, Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, MVVM Architecture, Retrofit + OkHttp, Android WorkManager, Biometrics API, ProGuard Obfuscation, GitHub Actions CI.

item.title: Backend Financial API
item.author: sebian.vandespiegle@student.odisee.be (Sebian Van de Spiegle)
item.description:
Skills Demonstrated: FastAPI, Python, Docker, PostgreSQL, REST API Design, Rate Limiting, JWT Authentication, Security Headers, SAST (Bandit/Trivy), Docker Compose.

Endpoints
#

Auth, stocks, portfolio, watchlist, market data.

item.title: Cloud & Virtualisation Labs
item.author: sebian.vandespiegle@student.odisee.be (Sebian Van de Spiegle)
item.description: Skills Demonstrated: Azure VM, VNet, NSG provisioning, Azure Container Instances (ACI), Infrastructure as Code (ARM Templates, Deployment Stacks), Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), VMware ESXi 8.0, Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) administration, vSwitch networking.

item.title: Homelab — orion-o6
item.author: sebian.vandespiegle@student.odisee.be (Sebian Van de Spiegle)
item.description: Skills Demonstrated: Docker Compose & volumes, Reverse proxying & SSL termination (Nginx/Traefik), Linux System Administration (Debian 12, cron jobs, logs), Database management (PostgreSQL), Network segmentation (Docker bridge, Tailscale), System security & isolation.
